GenoSim 1.0.0

  • Articles
    • Introduction to GenoSim: Forward-Time Genotype Simulation

Read a Family VCF Cohort into a Dosage Matrix

Source: R/vcf_reader.R
read_vcf_cohort.Rd

Reads genotype data from either a single multi-sample VCF file or a directory containing one VCF file per individual. Variant records are filtered to biallelic autosomal SNPs, merged across files on their common set of positions, and optionally imputed for missing genotypes.

read_vcf_cohort(
  vcf_input,
  min_qual = NULL,
  pass_filter_only = TRUE,
  biallelic_only = TRUE,
  impute_missing = TRUE,
  F_coef = 0,
  max_snps = 100000L,
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

vcf_input

Character. Either:

  • Path to a single multi-sample VCF file (all samples as columns), or

  • Path to a directory containing one .vcf or .vcf.gz file per individual. The filename stem (without extension) is used as the sample identifier and must match individual_id in the pedigree.

min_qual

Numeric or NULL. Minimum QUAL score threshold. Variants below this value are excluded. Default NULL (no filter).

pass_filter_only

Logical. Retain only FILTER == "PASS" or "." variants. Default TRUE.

biallelic_only

Logical. Keep only biallelic single-nucleotide variants. Multi-allelic sites and indels are dropped. Default TRUE.

impute_missing

Logical. If TRUE (default), missing genotypes (./.) are imputed by sampling from the observed allele frequency at that locus under the F_coef inbreeding model.

F_coef

Numeric in \([0,1)\). Inbreeding coefficient used when imputing missing genotypes. Default 0.

max_snps

Integer. Maximum number of SNPs to retain. If the merged matrix exceeds this limit, SNPs are randomly subsampled. Default 100000.

verbose

Logical. Print progress messages. Default TRUE.

Value

A list with:

geno_matrix

Integer matrix \(n_{individuals} \times n_{SNPs}\) of dosage values (0 = hom-ref, 1 = het, 2 = hom-alt). Rownames are sample identifiers; colnames are SNP IDs.

snp_map

A data.frame with columns snp_id, chrom, pos_bp, ref, alt, and cohort_maf (observed minor allele frequency in this cohort).

See also

read_pedigree, simulate_from_pedigree

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# From a directory of per-individual VCFs
vcf <- read_vcf_cohort("path/to/family_vcfs/")

# From a single multi-sample VCF
vcf <- read_vcf_cohort("path/to/family.vcf", min_qual = 30)

# With imputation using pedigree-derived F
vcf <- read_vcf_cohort("path/to/family_vcfs/",
                        impute_missing = TRUE, F_coef = 0.125)
} # }
